case_title: GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION VS. PAMELA A. ERB et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF HAROLD B. GLASSBERG IN SUPPORT OF PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT WITH REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PAMELA ERB MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473. DEFENDANT TO PAY $1,018 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. THE LIENS ARE VACATED. DEFENDANT TO FILE ANSWER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) (302/CWW)JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR 5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PAMELA ERB MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO ALAMEDA COUNTY. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO TRANSFER DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO MEET HER BURDEN THAT VENUE IS IMPROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO. (302/CWW)JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR 5797

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PAMELA ERB MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to set aside default and default judgment granted pursuant to CCP section 473. Defendant to pay $1,018 as reasonable attorney fees and costs. The liens are vacated. Defendant to file answer within five days. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PAMELA ERB Motion to Transfer Action to Alameda County. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to transfer denied. Defendant fails to meet her burden that venue is improper in San Francisco. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Off Calendar
